creator: bst2006@dva.dyndns.org
text:
As I said, the bug was always reproducible on a RELENG_6 server. I 
applied the patch and now I can kill/restart mpd and pf without a crash.
I tried it many times and in random order.

My RELENG_7 server is running this patch now for serval days without a 
problem.

Problem solved! THANK YOU VERY MUCH!

Boris
